---
title: "Soccer Analysis Using Statsbomb Data"
date: "04-20-2026"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: cerulean
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Libraries

First Time installations
#install.packages("devtools")
#install.packages("remotes")
#remotes::install_version("SDMTools", "1.1-221")
#devtools::install_github("statsbomb/StatsBombR")

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

# Required packages by StatsBombR
library(stringi)
library(rvest)
library(RCurl)
library(foreach)
library(iterators)
library(parallel)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(sp)

library(StatsBombR)
```
